items.text: The disclosures in this section reflect our beliefs and opinions as to factors that could materially and adversely affect us in the future.
items.rationale: Generic cautionary framing about beliefs and opinions, no specific risk introduced.

items.text: References to past events are provided by way of example only and are not intended to be a complete listing or a representation as to whether or not such factors have occurred in the past.
items.rationale: Boilerplate clarification about the nature of examples used, not a substantive risk.
